title: VowViolation
description: Runtime vow violation emitted to stderr (debug mode only). This is emitted by the vow-runtime C code, not by serde.

vow_id.description: Numeric ID of the violated vow

blame.description: Who is blamed: Caller for requires violations, Callee for ensures/invariant

offset.description: Byte offset of the vow in the source file

values.description: Runtime values of free variables in the predicate (optional, present when bindings exist)
